deferrals.V3: Retained recursive scene graph and performance acceptance remain deferred.
deferrals.V4: Mobile/DPR cap, reduced motion, pointer/touch, accessibility, and general checked-in capture automation remain deferred.

captureProtocol.browser: existing system Chrome executable; headless; not a managed Playwright browser download
captureProtocol.isolation: fresh isolated browser context and page for each valid and invalid query
captureProtocol.timeAuthority: VisualTransactionController normalized progress; no wall-clock/ticker advancement
captureProtocol.readiness: explicitRenderRevision equals current renderRevision, then stable across two requestAnimationFrame reads

syntheticQaStateNotice: All captures use inline synthetic non-level V1 QA states. They are not authored levels, serialization, campaign content, or special production rules.
